name: Cloud Function is publicly invocable
description: This Cloud Function grants the roles/cloudfunctions.invoker role to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers, allowing anyone on the internet to invoke it without authentication. Unauthenticated invocation can lead to unauthorized code execution, data exposure, or abuse.
remediation: Remove allUsers and allAuthenticatedUsers from the Cloud Function's IAM policy. If the function must be publicly accessible, place a Cloud Load Balancer or API Gateway (Cloud Endpoints) with authentication in front of it.
